sn1.27:1.0.1: v.68"From where do the streams turn back?Where does the round no longer revolve?Where does name-and-form cease,Stop without remainder?"
sn1.27:1.0.2: v.69"Where water, earth, fire, and air,Do not gain a footing:It is from here that the streams turn back,Here that the round no longer revolves;Here name-and-form ceases,Stops without remainder."
